title: noenchantlimits
description: Removes vanilla enchantment compatibility restrictions, allowing normally incompatible enchantments to be combined using an anvil.
body:
No Enchant Limits

No Enchant Limits removes vanilla enchantment restrictions and allows you to combine enchantments that are normally incompatible.

✨ Features

Allows incompatible enchantments to be used together
(e.g. Sharpness + Smite + Bane of Arthropods, Protection + Fire Protection, etc.)

Removes enchantment conflict checks in anvil logic

Enchantments behave normally otherwise — no custom mechanics added

Lightweight and focused: does one thing only

Works with vanilla enchantments

Server-side friendly (clients only need the mod if required by the server)

🔧 How it works

Vanilla Minecraft blocks certain enchantment combinations directly in the anvil code.
This mod disables those compatibility checks, allowing any enchantments to be merged together while keeping the rest of the enchanting system unchanged.
